message:
refactor(build): Move frozen_functions.c to shared location

Changes:
1. Move from zig-out/cache/bench/ to zig-out/cache/ (shared)
2. Update build.zig to always use shared location
3. Update runtime.zig to generate to shared location
4. Update .gitignore to track shared frozen_functions.c only

Why shared:
- frozen_functions.c is generated from polyfills (same for all projects)
- Only changes when opcode handlers or polyfills change
- No per-directory duplication needed

Result:
- One 1.1MB frozen_functions.c for ALL projects (bench/, examples/, etc.)
- CI only compiles once, not per-benchmark

files.patch:
@@ -1,9 +1,8 @@
 # Zig build artifacts
 zig-out/
-# Exception: commit frozen_functions.c for benchmarks (only regenerate when JS/polyfills/freeze tool changes)
+# Exception: commit SHARED frozen_functions.c (only changes when opcode handlers or polyfills change)
 !zig-out/cache/
-!zig-out/cache/bench/
-!zig-out/cache/bench/frozen_functions.c
+!zig-out/cache/frozen_functions.c
 zig-cache/
 .zig-cache/
